message:
feat(bocpd): add tracing spans, logging, and metrics for BOCPD observability (bd-37a.3)

Adds the observability layer required by the BOCPD resize coalescing bead:
- TRACING: debug_span 'bocpd.update' with run_length_posterior_max,
  change_point_probability, coalescing_active, resize_count_in_window
- LOG: INFO on regime transitions (from/to regime, p_burst), DEBUG for
  posterior updates and run-length histogram
- METRICS: static AtomicU64 counter bocpd_change_points_detected_total
  with public accessor fn
- Tracks previous_regime in BocpdDetector for transition detection
- 4 new tests for observability (77 total BOCPD tests pass)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
